subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen proclaimeth: O friends of Truth! The purpose of bearing these successive tribulations and calamities [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی میفرماید ای دوستان حق مقصود از حمل این رزایای متواتره و بلایای
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @high station of the true believer, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
